description: Cdiscount is a French e-commerce marketplace. Its marketplace seller integrations are delivered through Octopia, which provides programmatic access for sellers to manage products, offers, orders, customer discussions, fulfillment, and financial data.
summary: cdiscount.com exposes a public MCP endpoint and directs marketplace sellers to the Octopia Seller REST API for catalog, offer, order, fulfillment, discussion, and financial automation.

surfaces.name: Octopia Seller REST API for Cdiscount Marketplace sellers
